calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Anthony D. Agpaoa, Esq. for Plaintiff: Zulma Arely Gonzalez de Paz, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Maria A. Ochoa as follows:
Principal $40,000.00
Costs $353.50 for a total of $40,353.50
Judgment signed in open court.
